observation.summary: Architecture docs still include reader-authored Markdown that is not generated and has no direct .riido.json sibling.

hypothesis.summary: A coverage verifier can make manual prose visible as registered debt and fail CI when new unregistered interpretation variance appears.

execution.summary: Run knowledgecoverage to classify 30-architecture Markdown as generated, direct SSOT, or registered manual surface.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects unregistered manual architecture docs and reports generated/direct/manual counts.

retrospective.summary: Loop engineering gaps become a machine-checked inventory instead of an informal review note.

evidence.proves: architecture markdown knowledge is generated, direct-SSOT backed, or registered as manual debt
public CI uploads executable knowledge coverage evidence
